RANK-based dated-tree PGLS (phylogenetic Spearman, Pagel's lambda ML).
matched species on dated tree: 182

=== rank(comadre_log_damping) ~ rank(predictor) ===
predictor        beta*       SE        t        p  Pagel-l
lambda(A0)       0.322    0.073     4.39   0.0000    0.090
k_M              0.389    0.068     5.70   0.0000    0.000
g                0.011    0.083     0.14   0.8914    0.212

=== rank(comadre_log_damping) ~ rank(predictor) + rank(generation_time) (n=178) ===
predictor        beta*       SE        t        p  Pagel-l
lambda(A0)       0.104    0.093     1.12   0.2647    0.134
k_M              0.221    0.086     2.59   0.0105    0.073
g               -0.052    0.075    -0.69   0.4892    0.138

beta* on standardized ranks = the phylogeny-corrected partial-Spearman coefficient.
Compare with the non-phylogenetic Spearman partials (k_M +0.264** on gen, +0.190* within-Order).
